title: Lantheus Weighs ~$7B Sale After Curium Takeover Offer
headline: Radiopharmaceutical company Lantheus Holdings (LNTH) is considering a sale after receiving a takeover bid from private-equity-backed Curium Pharma valuing it at approximately $7 billion.
key_facts: $7 billion valuation; LNTH stock surged 7.4%; Curium is PE-backed

title: ASCO 2026 Abstracts Drop — Major Cancer Data Preview
headline: Clinical trial abstracts posted May 22 ahead of ASCO 2026 (starting May 29) reveal anticipated datasets from Merck, BioNTech, Eli Lilly, and Moderna.
key_facts: Abstracts dropped May 22; ASCO meeting begins May 29; datasets from Merck, BioNTech, Eli Lilly, and Moderna

title: Biogen/Denali Parkinson's Drug Fails in Study
headline: A Parkinson's disease drug from Biogen and Denali Therapeutics came up short in clinical testing, compounding strategic pressure on both companies.
key_facts: Study failure reported May 21–22; Biogen also facing Alzheimer's tau program setback

title: Bristol Myers Squibb Alzheimer's & AI Strategy Advances
headline: BMS sees 'big promise beyond amyloid' in Alzheimer's disease while deepening AI investment through collaboration with Anthropic, amid political scrutiny of its $15.2B Hengrui deal.
key_facts: $15.2 billion Hengrui deal; more than a dozen early-stage drugs; GOP chairman seeks biotech clampdown on BMS-China deal

title: EU Backs AZ Etcamah & Novo Oral Wegovy; Datroway Approved
headline: European regulators recommended approval of AstraZeneca's Etcamah and Novo Nordisk's oral Wegovy, while AZ/Daiichi Sankyo's Datroway won approval in first-line triple-negative breast cancer.
key_facts: EU recommendations for Etcamah and oral Wegovy; Datroway approved in first-line TNBC; both May 22

title: AbbVie Trims Allergan Workforce; Novartis Also Cutting US Jobs
headline: AbbVie is trimming 85 jobs at its Allergan Irvine, California site effective July 20, while Novartis is also reducing its US workforce.
key_facts: AbbVie cutting 85 jobs; effective July 20; Allergan Irvine site; May 22 WARN notice

title: BridgeBio Acoramidis Data at HF 2026; Q1 Revenue Beat
headline: BridgeBio presented new acoramidis data in ATTR cardiomyopathy at Heart Failure 2026 and reported Q1 2026 revenue beat driven by Attruby sales surge.
key_facts: Stock up 97% YoY; market cap ~$13.23B; trading at $69.12 (17% premium to $48 Morningstar fair value); $500M share repurchase program; Q1 revenue beat from Attruby

title: Eli Lilly Acquires Engage for Non-Viral Genetic Medicines
headline: Eli Lilly acquired Engage Therapeutics to advance non-viral genetic medicines technology and overcome longstanding delivery limitations.
key_facts: Non-viral genetic medicines platform; deal terms not disclosed; part of Lilly's genetic medicine strategy expansion

title: Gilead Hepcludex Cleared by FDA Four Years After Prior Rejection
headline: FDA cleared Gilead's Hepcludex for hepatitis D treatment, marking approval four years after a prior rejection.
key_facts: FDA clearance May 22; four years after prior rejection; hepatitis D indication

title: Leqembi Autoinjector PDUFA Extended to August 24
headline: Biogen's Leqembi autoinjector PDUFA date extended from May 24 to August 24.
key_facts: PDUFA extended from May 24 to August 24; autoinjector formulation

title: Lilly Retatrutide TRIUMPH-1 Phase 3 Obesity Data Disclosed
headline: Eli Lilly disclosed Phase 3 TRIUMPH-1 obesity data for retatrutide, with results from the trial released May 21.
key_facts: TRIUMPH-1 Phase 3 trial; obesity indication; data disclosed May 21
